message:
fix: migrate rate limiter to parking_lot::Mutex and warn on weak salt fallback

- Rate limiter now uses parking_lot::Mutex, eliminating PoisonError
  recovery boilerplate and preventing cascading failures
- Password salt fallback now emits a stderr warning when /dev/urandom
  is unavailable, making the security degradation visible

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
